title: Shield Model
description: A cool and more realistic shield model pack for CPVP, Axe, Sword, Or whatever gamemode/fight that requires usage of a shield!
body:
# The BEST Shield Model Pack on Modrinth!


This pack makes the Shield Model look way cooler and more realistic! If you're looking to step up your PvP Clips by showcasing the BEST Texture packs, this Shield Model Pack is the pack to show.

### What this pack does:
- This pack makes the shield model (hand-held/blocking) look way cooler and way more realistic!

### Can i see how it looks?
- Sure, image attached below of it whilst blocking!
- ![Shield Blocking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc2c64bea51fc3ff56a81781d15064e965119d4.png)

## Will this affect my view?
- No it will not, you can also actually get an overlay for a [smaller shield here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crystal-pvp-lt3-essentials/versions) with one of my other packs!
